# General Intelligence Labs

#### Where data fuels embodied intelligence

[![Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/gilabs.xyz-000000?style=flat-square&logo=safari&logoColor=white)](https://gilabs.xyz)
[![Blog](https://img.shields.io/badge/Blog-000000?style=flat-square&logo=rss&logoColor=white)](https://gilabs.xyz/blog)
[![X](https://img.shields.io/badge/@gi__labs-000000?style=flat-square&logo=x&logoColor=white)](https://x.com/gi_labs)
[![LinkedIn](https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-000000?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage%2Fsvg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%3D)](https://www.linkedin.com/company/general-intelligence-labs/)
[![Book a demo](https://img.shields.io/badge/Book%20a%20demo-000000?style=flat-square&logo=googlecalendar&logoColor=white)](https://cal.com/gilabs)

</div>

**Robotics is entering its data-driven era.** The bitter lesson holds: hand-crafted solutions give way to learning at scale, and robotic capability follows powerful models trained on massive, high-quality data. We are a group of AI researchers, roboticists, and engineers who co-design the **perception → model → action** stack — putting human dexterity to work at planet scale to power the next billion robots.

**Read more** &nbsp; [Introducing GI Labs](https://gilabs.xyz/blog) &nbsp;·&nbsp; [EGO1 capture headset](https://gilabs.xyz/products/ego1) &nbsp;·&nbsp; [Tracking dexterous hands](https://gilabs.xyz/blog)

**Open source** &nbsp; [device-firmware](https://github.com/General-Intelligence-Labs/device-firmware) &nbsp;·&nbsp; [branding-guidelines](https://github.com/General-Intelligence-Labs/gilabs-branding-guidelines)
